name: create_invoice
description: Create a new invoice for a customer with line items, due date, and memo. The invoice is created as a draft and can be sent separately. Each line item references a product or includes a freeform description.

parameters.name: businessId
parameters.description: The ID of the business creating the invoice.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The ID of the customer being invoiced.

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: Array of line items, each with productId or description, quantity, and unitPrice.

parameters.name: dueDate
parameters.description: The invoice due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: memo
parameters.description: Optional note or memo to include on the invoice.

body.query: mutation($input: InvoiceCreateInput!) { invoiceCreate(input: $input) { invoice { id status total { value currency { code } } } didSucceed inputErrors { path message code } } }
